log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, likely a spreader or runtime module, with a Borland Delphi compiler and packer. Investigate the network activity to identify potential command and control (C2) servers
The sample performed DNS lookups to two IP addresses, 82.209.230.72 and 178.172.160.4. Investigate the registry changes to see if there are any persistence mechanisms.
There are no persistence keys found in the registry changes. Investigate the dropped files to see if any malicious files were written to disk.
No malicious files were written to disk. Investigate the process activity to see if any suspicious processes were spawned.
The highlighted API call, SetFileTime, is suspicious. Investigate the CAPA behaviors to see if there are any capability rules that match this behavior.

The highlighted API call, SetFileTime, is associated with the capability rule 'set file time'. This behavior is likely used for persistence or evasion. Investigate the TTPs to see if there are any sus
